name: Veritone, Inc.
summary: Veritone, Inc. is an AI technology company offering its aiWARE platform, a SaaS-based AI operating system that enables organizations to leverage artificial intelligence applications. The company serves media, entertainment, legal, compliance, and government sectors. Veritone also operated a full-service advertising agency, Veritone One, which was divested, and completed an acquisition of Broadbean, a talent acquisition technology company.

products.name: aiWARE
products.description: AI operating system and SaaS platform enabling organizations to build and deploy AI-based applications.

products.name: iDEMs
products.description: AI-based software product offered through Veritone's platform, cited as a driver of future growth.

products.name: VDR
products.description: AI-based software product offered through Veritone's platform, cited as a driver of future growth.

products.name: Veritone One
products.description: Full-service advertising agency operated by Veritone, subject to sale/divestiture.
